title: malaxis acuminata var. biloba
intro: Malaxis acuminata var. biloba, also known as the bilobed Malaxis, is a variant of the Malaxis acuminata orchid species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Malaxis acuminata var. biloba include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin irritations, as well as its potential anti-viral and anti-bacterial properties. Malaxis acuminata var. biloba can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, often combined with other medicinal plants, to utilize its medicinal properties.
